title: Values-Based Living When Tinnitus Tries to Shrink Your World
phrases: "The question is never whether the pain will come. The question is whether you'll meet it with presence or with narrative."
"Reading about meditation is to meditation what reading the menu is to eating."

"The body remembers what the mind would prefer to file away."
interjections: Think about that for a second.

title: The Difference Between Coping and Thriving with Tinnitus

title: How Meaning-Making Transforms the Tinnitus Experience

title: Neuroplasticity and Rewiring Your Response to Tinnitus
phrases: "What we call 'stuck' is usually the body doing exactly what it was designed to do under conditions that no longer exist."

title: The Power of Defusion Techniques for Tinnitus Thoughts
phrases: "There's a difference between being alone and being with yourself. One is circumstance. The other is practice."
"Most people don't fear change. They fear the gap between who they were and who they haven't become yet."
